mapper.select: SELECT sm.menu_id FROM tz_sys_role_menu rm LEFT JOIN tz_sys_menu sm ON rm.menu_id=sm.menu_id WHERE sm.app_type=#{appType} AND rm.role_id=#{roleId}
select menu_id,`name` from tz_sys_menu where parent_id = #{parentId}

select m.menu_id,m.parent_id from tz_sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN tz_sys_role_menu rm on ur.role_id = rm.role_id LEFT JOIN tz_sys_menu m on rm.menu_id = m.menu_id where ur.user_id = #{userId} and perms!=""
